name: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause supplier penalties. We send monthly renewal reminders instead of manual tracking of contract dates in spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
problem_solved: missed contract renewals due to lack of reminders
features: manual entry of contract expiration dates

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: missed contract renewals due to lack of reminders
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause supplier penalties. We send monthly renewal reminders instead of manual tracking of contract dates in spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of contract dates in spreadsheets
must_have_features: manual entry of contract expiration dates

one_liner: For procurement managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause supplier penalties. We send monthly renewal reminders instead of manual tracking of contract dates in spreadsheets.
